titleStmt.title: SII 34.128: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 128. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records a gift of land for offerings to the temple of Āḻvār on the hill of Tiruveṟumbiyūr in Kavira-nāḍu by the ūrār of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOpparakEcaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu
10 6 Āvatu kavira nāṭṭu tiruverumpiyū
r Ūrōm Eṅkaḷ tiruveṟumpiyūrt ti
rumalaiyāḷvārkku Arddhayāmam Amutu
ceyya vaitta pōṉakappaḻavarici nāḻi po
rikkaṟiyamutu 1 neyyamutu Orupiṭiyum
tayiramutu nāḻiyu Aṭaikkāyamutu Āṟum Ilaiyamutu Ōraṭukku Āka Ippaṭi ca
ntrātittavaṟ ceyya vaitta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr mīyūrk kayilāya vayakkalukku
m kaṇavati vayakkalukkum Icaitta kīḻpāṟkellai vaṭakku nōkkip pōṉa vāykkā
lukku mēkkum teṉpāṟkellai talaivāy ṉilattukku vaṭakkum talaivāy ṉilattu
kku mēkkum teṉpāṟkellai kāṉāṟṟukku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai kucavaṉilattu
kkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṇṭūruṭaiyā ṉakkaṉ cātta nilattukkum mañcaṉ
(caṉ) cantiraṉi
lattukku
teṟkkum Araici vayakkalukku kīḻpāṟkellai vāykkālu
kku mēkkum vāykkālukku vaṭakkum cantiraṉ piṭāraṉilattu
kkum kiḻakkum kollaṉilattukku teṟkkum Āka Iraṇṭu ki
nilam Iṟaiyili candrātittavaṟ Uṇṇilamoḻiviṉṟi tiruveṟumpiyūr malaiy
tēvarkku kuṭuttōm tiruveṟumpiyūrōm panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.128 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
